description:
Legal record (#30) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 8r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 1 Nisan 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #30) Investment partnership connected to an apotropos (guardianship) fund for Yaʿaqov and Esther, the orphans of Moshe Juwwānī/Jawwānī—whose widow Ḥabība is still alive and known from previous entries in the same court register (documents #27-29). On behalf of the young children (קטנים), Ḥabība and Simḥa (the children's paternal grandmother) previously invested a large sum of 75,000 medin with Shelomo ha-Levi Skandarī and Yosef b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Levi. The purpose of this entry is to recount how the children's mother and grandmother had received 15,000 medin back from Shelomo ha-Levi Skandarī and Yosef b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Levi. The sum is then annotated on an itemized basis, such as: an apartment on Darb al-לולויה, Passover donations, payments of some kind connected to Ḥelwān(?), among many others. MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#30) בפנקס בית דין רבני בקהיר (BL OR 6356, דף 8r); בעברית; א' ניסן ה'תמ"ג (1683 לספירה); שותפות השקעה הקשורה לקרן אפוטרופסות עבור יעקב ואסתר, יתומי משה גוואני; אמם חביבה וסבתם שמחה השקיעו בעבר 75,000 מֶדין; הרשומה מתארת קבלת חזרה של 15,000 מֶדין עם פירוט
